3017787.title: SpongeBob
3017787.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3017873.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3017873.description: Felicity is overwhelmed by the responsibility of owning her first pet, a cute but mischievous creature called a Winky. // Athena loses her confidence when, for the first time ever, she gets a fact about Mythlandia wrong.

3017942.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3017942.description: Felicity is questioning what she's meant to be when she baby-sits a little changeling girl, struggling with the same issue. // When Felicity comes to the aid of a stinky stranger named Rip Van Stinkle, he vows to be at her beck and call for life.

3018015.title: Dorg van Dango
3018015.description: It's Dorg's turn to look after the class hamster Zippy, but a series of magical mishaps lead the gang and the hamster into body-swapping chaos! // Dorg can't sleep. Patronella casts a spell to help him but puts all of Normill to sleep instead!

3018313.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3018313.description: An accidental zap from the Fresherizer ray turns Skipper into an adorable baby. // The zoo animals are in a panic when word reaches them that Savio the boa constrictor has escaped from the Hoboken Zoo and is heading to them bent on revenge.

3018372.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3018372.description: Kowalski's obsession with Doris the dolphin drives him to invent a love ray, the Love-U-Laser. // Told as a courtroom flashback, Kowalski unwisely revives Jiggles in a small, whipped cream-eating version.

3018439.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3018439.description: Michelangelo befriends an unstable mutant alligator who possesses a strange piece of Kraang technology, but the other Turtles aren't sure whether Leatherhead is a friend or a foe.

3018483.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3018483.description: Leonardo, tired of Raphael's constant criticism, lets his brother try his hand at leadership for a while. Meanwhile, Leonardo meets a beautiful and dangerous female ninja who tries to lure Leonardo to the dark side.

3018810.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3018810.description: Poof goes through the terrible twos. Foop goes through the terrific twos. Timmy and his fairies have to survive Poof's terrible twos. // Timmy wishes up the world's coolest smartphone but it soon starts to take over Timmy's life.

3018842.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3018842.description: Timmy wishes his ancestors had picked different careers. Timmy's family becomes rich and spoiled.

3018891.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3018891.description: While cleaning out their treehouse, the girls remember how they saved the tree from being cut down, and made it their home.

3018915.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3018915.description: Believing Simon is going away to a boarding school, Alvin and Theodore do all they can to thwart his departure and keep him at home.

3018960.title: SpongeBob
3018960.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3019004.title: SpongeBob
3019004.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3019309.title: SpongeBob
3019309.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3019353.title: SpongeBob
3019353.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3019414.title: SpongeBob
3019414.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3019473.title: SpongeBob
3019473.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3019832.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3019832.description: When Alvin inadvertently destroys Theodore's bicycle, he enters the boys in a roundup of shopping carts where the first prize is a new bike.

3019855.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3019855.description: The Chipmunks and Chipettes try to reduce their carbon footprint when Jeanette signs them up for a Green Living competition.

3019896.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3019896.description: Alvin is so taken with a girl at school, that he agrees to look after her talking Mina bird. But when Alvin says something damaging, he worries the bird will repeat it to the girl and must find a way to keep the bird from blabbing.

3019938.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3019938.description: Kowalski accidentally creates a living blob of jelly. But 'Jiggles' has a big appetite and starts stealing fruit from the animals. / When a new TV show starts keeping people from coming to the zoo, the animals worry they'll lose their home.

3020290.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3020290.description: When a big fish starts terrorizing the inhabitants of the duck pond, Skipper leads his team on a mission to eliminate the aquatic menace. / When a beautiful female falcon crash-lands in the zoo, Skipper insists that she stays to recuperate.

3020345.title: Huize Herrie
3020345.description: Lori regrets everything she hasn't done in high school, and vows to make up for lost time in her senior year. // When Lola realizes that double the cuteness could help her break into show business, she teams up with Lily.

3020423.title: The Loud House
3020423.description: Lana wants to win a race car ride-along with her hero, so she and Lincoln enter to compete in a soap box derby. // When Luan must enroll in a culinary class, Dad uses it to share his passion for cooking with one of his kids.

3020513.title: De Casagrandes
3020513.description: The family tries to help Bobby get over his test taking anxieties. // Carl gets lost in the city zoo after sneaking away from his family, in search of Keyon, the Komodo dragon.

3020824.title: De Casagrandes
3020824.description: Ronnie Anne tries to convince her Dad to move to the city while he is visiting. With the help of Sid, she devices a plan that seems too good to fail.

3020921.title: SpongeBob
3020921.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3021005.title: SpongeBob
3021005.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3021294.title: SpongeBob
3021294.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3021372.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3021372.description: To save Schwoz from an experiment gone wrong, Captain Man & Kid Danger must follow instructions he posted online, but first they need decent wifi.

3021436.title: Breadwinners
3021436.description: Buhdeuce is lured away from Breadwinning by the glitz and glamour of being a movie star. // When Mrs. Furfle falls into a deep magical sleep, SwaySway and Buhdeuce pretend she's awake so she won't miss her big date with T-Midi.

3021498.title: Dorg van Dango
3021498.description: When Dorg accidentally shrinks his sister's Adventure Club sash, he must replace the badges. // Dorg wants a good scare, so Patronella fills his house with all the gang's secret fears. Dorg finds out he's more scare-able than he thought!

3021813.title: Sanjay & Craig
3021813.description: Sanjay is star-struck when he meets his favorite movie villain - until he discovers the actor is not so different from his devious onscreen personae. // Sanjay and Craig discover a way to hypnotize Darlene and Vijay.

3021900.title: Sanjay & Craig
3021900.description: The kids stage a Tufflips movie-marathon, but staying awake through every cheesy flick proves tougher than they expected. // Craig is desperate for cuddling after he sees the neighborhood pets receiving so much tender affection.

3021968.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3021968.description: When Rico gets a freaky fortune from his cookie, he initially ignores it. Julien sets out to make Rico's fortune come true. / A female chimp named Lulu arrives at the zoo for a short stay, and Phil is smitten. Unfortunately, Lulu falls for Mason.

3022018.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3022018.description: The penguins and lemurs face off in a race. The penguins in a souped-up version of their car and the lemurs in Alice's zoo cart. Winner takes the loser's car!

3022332.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3022332.description: The Turtles return to the city to search for Splinter, only to find that the city is overrun with Kraang.

3022387.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3022387.description: As the Turtles search for Karai, they have to deal with a city filled with Kraangdroids as well as Zeck and Steranko, who hunt Karai for their own means.

3022455.title: Ollie's Pack
3022455.description: After recess gets cancelled, Ollie directs Lucius Van Horn to play VP Magna and change up the rules. // In hopes of making some extra cash for a Mother's Day gift, Ollie rents his shed to bounty hunters Andre and Bev.

3022811.title: SpongeBob
3022811.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3022871.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3022871.description: When Mantis returns to his hometown claiming to be the Dragon Warrior to impress his ex-fiancé, Po pretends to be his sidekick who doesn't know kung fu.

3022978.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3022978.description: Shifu tells the citizens of the Valley of Peace that whoever can defeat Po before sunset will become the new Dragon Warrior. When Hundun hears of the challenge, he returns to the village to claim the title.

3023022.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3023022.description: Brittany is humiliated by Jeanette's lack of style. That is, until Jeanette is proclaimed a fashion trendsetter by Brittany's style icon. Now Brittany wants to prove she's more stylish than her sister.

3023318.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3023318.description: Simon is too embarrassed to kiss his co-star in the school play. So in a moment of desperation, he agrees to allow Alvin to switch identities.

3023341.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3023341.description: Anxious to give Dave a much-needed rest, Alvin secretly decides to rent out their house for a Hawaiian home-swap. Problem is, the house guests show up early while Dave is still home.

3023363.title: SpongeBob
3023363.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3023443.title: SpongeBob
3023443.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3023509.title: De Casagrandes
3023509.description: Carlota worries that her family will embarrass her after her vlog is discovered by a famous musician. // Hector becomes Ronnie Anne and Carl's newest classmate after deciding to finish his schooling.

3023858.title: Huize Herrie
3023858.description: Lincoln purchases a kiddie pool, and things get out of hand when all 10 of his sisters want to use it. // After noticing that none of his sisters share his interests, Lincoln attempts to mold Lily into his mini-me.

3023903.title: Huize Herrie
3023903.description: When Lincoln and Clyde go to tour the middle school, Lynn gives them some questionable advice.

3070936.title: Hier is Pony
3070936.description: When Annie finds a lost wallet, she's determined to return it to its owner and prove she's a good person. // Annie and Pony get locked out of their building, and they can't seem to convince their neighbors to let them back in.

3023958.title: Hier is Pony
3023958.description: Annie and Pony's plan to teach a scrawny chicken confidence backfires when it terrorizes the city. // Annie and Pony try to help Gerry pass the test to become a museum tour guide.

3024286.title: SpongeBob
3024286.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3024343.title: SpongeBob
3024343.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3024416.title: SpongeBob
3024416.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3024509.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3024509.description: The Turtles must defend their home in the sewers when Bradford tries to destroy it with a dangerous chemical.

3024831.title: Huize Herrie
3024831.description: After seeing a scary movie (that his parents told him not to), Lincoln can't go to sleep and pulls an all-nighter. // When a common cold ravages through the loud house, Lincoln believes his sisters have turned into Zombies!

3024909.title: The Loud House
3024909.description: Lincoln gets a tutor that all his sisters instantly get crushes on, making it impossible for Lincoln to study. // The kids complain about their house, but when a tornado threatens to destroy it, they start to feel differently.

3024995.title: De Casagrandes
3024995.description: Ronnie Anne and Sid are pumped up for their sleepover, but Carl and Adelaide might ruin the day! // After a disagreement with Abuelo, Bobby goes to work for Mr. Hong to try out his new business ideas.

3025332.title: SpongeBob
3025332.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3025429.title: SpongeBob
3025429.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3025501.title: Avatar
3025501.description: As one of Aang's little detours, the group heads toward the island of Kyoshi. But soon they learn that the townspeople don't trust foreigners at all; however, when Aang proves to them that he is the Avatar they are treated as guests of honor.

3025840.title: Avatar
3025840.description: Aang takes Katara and Sokka back to a favorite place he used to go to when he was younger, the Earth Kingdom City of Omashu. But when they break the law they are taken to the King to get their punishment.

3025925.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3025925.description: Crocker seeks out a new source of magic from Timmy's house. Realizing it's Sparky, Crocker tries to turn him against Timmy. // Timmy wishes everyone was dumber than him. A meteor threatens Earth and Timmy's the only one smart enough to stop it.

3025995.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3025995.description: Vicky decides to be an actress and makes Timmy help her land her first role.

3026012.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3026012.description: When the Furious 5 are all out of town and the Jade Palace is attacked, Po only has his dad and two old people to help him.

3026344.title: Ollie's Pack
3026344.description: When Ollie blames Wowski for not prepping him for a Chosen One test, they have a falling out. // When Ollie is paired with Ivy for a science class project, he tries to shake his slacker image to impress her.

3026396.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3026396.description: When his brothers won't listen to Theodore's song, he posts a video of himself rapping on the Internet and it becomes a mega-hit! Soon Theodore, (now Lil T), is offered a solo career and has to decide between family and fame as a solo artist.

3026421.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3026421.description: When Alvin sees a sparkling diamond buried in his neighbor's rose garden, he's sure she's responsible for the recent diamond heist. So, with the help of Theodore and a VERY reluctant Simon, Alvin sets about proving it.

3026448.title: Huize Herrie
3026448.description: Lincoln devises a plan to get the best seat in the car for a long, family, road trip. // Lincoln tries to prove he's mature enough to have dinner at the adult table, leaving the kiddie table behind him.

3026508.title: De Casagrandes
3026508.description: Ronnie Anne and her primos try to win Maria a trip around the world. // When Carlota fails at hair cutting, she trains with the master barber himself - CJ!

3026831.title: SpongeBob
3026831.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3072970.title: SpongeBob
3072970.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.
